metadata.description: AKS node resource group name (MC_*). Run: az aks show -g CraftedSpecially -n CraftedSpecially-aks --query nodeResourceGroup -o tsv
VMSS names to enroll as Chaos Studio targets. Run: az vmss list -g <NODE_RG> --query "[].name" -o tsv
Enable Azure Load Testing
Public API endpoint FQDN (e.g., craftedspecially-pip.eastus.cloudapp.azure.com)
API protocol (http or https)
API port number
Location for the health model. Microsoft.CloudHealth/healthmodels is only available in a subset of regions.
Azure region for all chaos resources
Short prefix used for resource naming
Name of the Chaos Studio experiment resource
Environment tag value used in the KQL target selector query (e.g. staging, prod). Must match the `environment` tag on the AKS node pool VMSSes.
Availability zone to fault (1, 2, or 3)
Duration of the fault in minutes
Name of the AKS node resource group (MC_*) where the VMSS resources live
Names of the AKS user node pool VMSSes in the node resource group to enroll as Chaos Studio targets
Principal ID of the Chaos Studio managed identity
Resource ID of the managed identity (used to make the role assignment name stable)
Principal ID of the Chaos Studio managed identity
Resource ID of the managed identity (used to make the role assignment name stable)
Name of the VMSS backing the AKS node pool
Azure region for the target resource
Name of the Chaos Studio experiment
Azure region
Environment tag value used in the KQL target query (e.g. staging, prod). Matches the `environment` tag on AKS node pool VMSSes.
Azure subscription ID scoped in the KQL selector query
Availability zone to fault (1, 2, or 3)
Duration of the fault in minutes (default 10)
Resource ID of the user-assigned managed identity used by the experiment

selectors.queryString: [format('Resources | where type == ''microsoft.compute/virtualmachinescalesets'' | where tags[''chaos-target''] == ''true'' and tags[''environment''] == ''{0}''', parameters('environment'))]

metadata.description: Public API endpoint FQDN for load testing (e.g., craftedspecially-pip.eastus.cloudapp.azure.com)
API protocol (http or https)
API port number
Application Insights instrumentation key
Application Insights connection string
Key Vault resource ID for storing test credentials
Smoke test: single user, 2 minute duration
Load test: 100 users ramped over 2 minutes, 10 minute sustain
Spike test: 500 users instantaneous, 5 minute duration
Enable private endpoint for load testing (optional)
Subnet ID for private endpoint (if enabled)
Application Insights instrumentation key for metrics collection
Application Insights connection string for metrics collection
Key Vault ID for storing test credentials
Public API endpoint FQDN for load testing (e.g., craftedspecially-pip.eastus.cloudapp.azure.com)
API protocol (http or https)
API port number

properties.description: Load testing service for CraftedSpecially API
